code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
model.start_operation('AWARE add layer', true)
rng = Random.new
layer = model.layers.add('AWARE')
layer.color = Sketchup::Color.new(rng.rand(256), rng.rand(256), rng.rand(256))
model.commit_operation
{ 'name' => layer.name, 'visible' => layer.visible?, 'color' => [layer.color.red, layer.color.green, layer.color.blue] }
